empty-auth-token.title: Your session is invalid
empty-auth-token.description: Please refresh this page to try onboarding again.

request-data.title: There are missing fields
request-data.description: Please return to previous steps to ensure all data is filled out

invalid-inputs.title: An error occurred
invalid-inputs.description: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.

email.title: Email address
email.subtitle: We are required to collect your email address.

email.label: Email
email.hint: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

errors.pattern: Add ”#string” (e.g., #test1) at the end of your email address.

basic-information.title: Basic Data
basic-information.subtitle: Spell your full legal first, middle and last names exactly as shown on your government-issued ID.

error.invalid: Date of birth cannot be empty or is invalid
error.future-date: Date of birth cannot be in the future
error.too-young: Must be at least 18 years old
error.too-old: Date of birth cannot be before than 1900

address-line-1.label: Address line 1
address-line-1.error: Address cannot be empty and must be a residential address (e.g. cannot be a P.O. Box)

zipCode.label: Zip code
zipCode.error: Zip code cannot be empty or is invalid

residential-address.title: What's your residential address?
residential-address.subtitle: Make sure to provide your updated residential address (no P.O. Boxes).

legal-status.title: What's your legal status in the U.S.?
legal-status.subtitle: We need to collect this information to complete your profile.

statuses.permanent-resident: I have a Green Card/I'm a permanent resident

nationality.label: Country of birth
nationality.error: Country of birth cannot be empty

citizenship.label: Citizenship
citizenship.us-citizen-error: If you are a US citizen, please select the "I'm a citizen" option above

error.required: Visa expiration date cannot be empty

full.title: What's your Social Security Number?
full.subtitle: We need to collect this information to verify your identity.

security.title: Your data is safe
security.description: Your SSN is encrypted and protected by a state-of-the-art secure environment.

form.label: SSN
form.error: SSN cannot be empty or is invalid

last-four.title: What are the last 4 digits of your Social Security Number?
last-four.subtitle: We need to collect this information to verify your identity.

form.label: SSN (last 4)
form.error: SSN cannot be empty or is invalid

skip.cta: I don't have a Social Security Number

confirmation.title: No SSN?
confirmation.with-stepup-description: Please confirm that you don’t have an SSN.
confirmation.without-stepup-description: Please confirm that you don’t have an SSN. It may take a bit longer to verify your identity.

summary.title: Confirm your personal data
summary.subtitle: Please make sure that your personal data is accurate and there are no typos before continuing.

reveal-error.title: Something went wrong
reveal-error.description: We were not able to reveal your SSN. Please edit your SSN to save it again.

statuses.permanent_resident: I have a Green Card/I'm a permanent resident

identity.title: Identity
identity.ssn-skipped-subtext: You don't have a Social Security Number

invalid-inputs.title: An error occurred
invalid-inputs.description-with-message: An error occurred while saving data. {{message}}.
invalid-inputs.description-with-fields: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix these fields: {{fields}}.
invalid-inputs.description-generic: An error occurred while saving data. Please fix the inputs and try again.
